title: Corpanion
description: Corpanion - The Companion Mod for the German Corpium Minecraft Server.
body:
# Corpanion - The Corpium Companion Mod
This mod is a dedicated companion mod designed to enhance the [Corpium Minecraft server](https:://corpium.net) experience.
## Key Features
- **Custom Item Rarity Indicators**: This feature allows users to easily identify the worth of their items at a single glance, thanks to the colour-coded rarity system.
- **Custom Hotkeys**: The mod offers players the ability to customize their gameplay with shortcut keys, allowing quick and efficient navigation without needing to use commands or custom guis.
